Max: 58 characters. Full brand name never used in titles.

Deliverable format (same as Batch 2): URL | Current title | Proposed title | Char count

title: Water heater hub: meta + content audit
description:
Audit /plumbing/water-heaters/ and produce optimization recommendations.

Context: 158K impressions, 37 clicks, 0.02% CTR, position 26.7. Query cluster includes "water heater repair near me" (35K impr), "hot water heater repair near me" (26K impr), "water heater repair" (23K impr).

Deliverables:
• Current word count vs top 3 ranking competitors (manual check)
• New meta description (140–155 chars) optimized for "near me" and repair intent variants
• Internal link recommendations: identify 3–5 pages that should link to this hub
• Title tag review: current is "Water Heater Repair & Install Detroit | Same-Day Service | Cregger" (66 chars) — confirm or propose revision

title: Fix: add missing meta description to /blog/category/drains/
description:
The /blog/category/drains/ page is the only live page on the site missing a meta description. Add a 140–155 character meta description.

Suggested approach: "[X] expert drain cleaning tips and guides for Metro Detroit homeowners — from clogged drains to sewer line issues. Serving Ferndale and Oakland County since 1985."

Confirm character count before publishing. Mark complete in Basecamp once live.

title: Create new page: /sewer-drain/drain-cleaning/
description:
Create a dedicated drain cleaning service page. 113K impressions across 52 drain cleaning queries are landing on the generic /sewer-drain/ hub with no dedicated page to capture them.

Target queries:
• clogged drain cleaning service — 29,024 impr, pos 33
• clogged drain cleaning service near me — 26,984 impr, pos 24
• drain cleaning near me — 17,234 impr, pos 24
• clogged drain service — 20,648 impr, pos 21
• main drain cleaning — 6,276 impr, pos 13
• drain cleaning companies near me — 2,907 impr, pos 14

Deliverables:
• Word count: 1,200–1,500 words
• Sections: services overview, process, pricing signals, why professional drain cleaning, Metro Detroit / Oakland County service area
• Title (≤58 chars): lead with "Drain Cleaning" + Detroit/Metro Detroit geo, close "| Cregger"
• Meta description (140–155 chars): lead with service + speed + geo
• FAQPage schema: 4–6 questions targeting cost, process, DIY vs professional
• Internal links from: /sewer-drain/ hub, /sewer-drain/hydro-jetting/, /plumbing/water-heaters/, boiler service page
• Cross-link to /blog/drain-cleaning-cost-metro-detroit/ (already ranks pos 8.75)

title: AC installation: resolve page cannibalization + seasonal rewrite
description:
Two pages are competing for AC installation queries — /ac-installation/ and /air-conditioner-installation/ — splitting authority across 7,348 combined impressions at positions 19–29 with zero clicks. AC install demand peaks May–July. Act this week.

Steps:
1. Audit both pages — determine which has stronger links and content to be the canonical
2. 301 redirect the weaker page to the canonical; update all internal links accordingly
3. Rewrite the canonical page with install intent focus:
• Cost range for Metro Detroit (ballpark figures)
• Brands Cregger installs
• A2L refrigerant transition (EPA AIM Act — R-410A phaseout) as trust/expertise signal
• Process: what to expect on install day
• Word count: 1,000–1,400 words
4. Title (≤58 chars): "AC Installation Metro Detroit | Licensed HVAC Pros | Cregger"
5. Meta description (140–155 chars): lead with seasonal urgency + availability

Source: "ac installation" — 4,979 impr, pos 19.7, 0 clicks. "air conditioner installation" — 3,269 impr, pos 27.7, 0 clicks.

title: Sump pump page: H1, title + meta fix
description:
The sump pump page ranks #1 for "sump pump repair" (713 impr) and #3 for "sump pump replacement" (342 impr) but earns zero clicks. Slug change not recommended given the #1 ranking — fix the snippet only.

Issues:
• H1: "FLOOD CONTROL & SUMP PUMP SERVICES IN MICHIGAN" — all caps, vague, doesn't match searcher intent
• Title: "Sump Pump Installation & Repair | SE Michigan Experts" — missing "| Cregger" brand close
• Meta description: not optimised for repair and replacement intent

Deliverables:
• H1 rewrite: sentence case, lead with "sump pump repair and replacement" + Michigan geo
• Title update: add "| Cregger" close, confirm ≤58 chars total
• Meta description (140–155 chars): lead with "sump pump repair" + "same-day" or "24/7" + Metro Detroit service area

title: Water heater hub: meta + content audit
description:
Audit /plumbing/water-heaters/ and produce optimization recommendations.

Context: 158K impressions, 37 clicks, 0.02% CTR, position 26.7.
Key queries: "water heater repair near me" (35K impr, pos 28), "hot water heater repair near me" (26K impr, pos 23), "water heater repair" (23K impr, pos 42).

Deliverables:
• Current word count vs top 3 ranking competitors (manual check)
• New meta description (140–155 chars) optimized for "near me" + repair intent variants
• 3–5 internal link recommendations: which pages should link here and with what anchor text
• Title review: current "Water Heater Repair & Install Detroit | Same-Day Service | Cregger" (66 chars) — propose trim to ≤58 if possible without losing key terms

title: Site-wide H1 all-caps audit and fix pass
description:
The crawl reveals a widespread all-caps H1 pattern across service pages. All-caps H1s are occasionally pulled as the SERP snippet headline — signalling low content quality to searchers.

Confirmed instances:
• /ferndale-hvac/ — "FERNDALE AC & HEATING SERVICES"
• /plumbing/flood-control-sump-pumps/ — "FLOOD CONTROL & SUMP PUMP SERVICES IN MICHIGAN"
• /air-conditioning/ — "AIR CONDITIONING SERVICES IN MICHIGAN"
• /air-conditioning/ac-maintenance/ — "AIR CONDITIONING MAINTENANCE IN MICHIGAN"
• /air-conditioning/ac-installation/ — "AIR CONDITIONING INSTALLATION IN MICHIGAN"
• /ferndale-hvac/air-conditioning/ — "AIR CONDITIONING SERVICES IN FERNDALE"
• /ferndale-hvac/air-conditioning-repairs/ — "AIR CONDITIONING REPAIRS IN FERNDALE"
• /ferndale-hvac/indoor-air-quality/ — "FERNDALE INDOOR AIR QUALITY"
• /ferndale-hvac/heating-repair/ — "HEATING REPAIRS IN FERNDALE"

Deliverable: updated H1 for each page in sentence case, naturally incorporating the primary keyword and geo. Format: [URL] | [New H1] — one line per page, ready to publish.

title: Fix: Farmington location page meta description
description:
/farmington/ ranks at position 6.74 with 560 impressions and zero clicks. The meta description is boilerplate copy-pasted from Ferndale.

Current meta: "Get trusted plumbing, drain, sewer, heating, cooling, and indoor air quality services in Farmington, MI, from the pros at Cregger. Call us today!"

Deliverable: new meta description (140–155 chars) that is Farmington-specific, references Cregger's Farmington location, and includes a local trust signal or CTA. Do not reuse Ferndale boilerplate.

title: Investigate: position #1 queries with zero clicks — local pack audit
description:
Several queries where Cregger holds the #1 organic position are generating zero clicks. Before any on-page work, confirm the cause via manual SERP check.

Queries to audit:
• "plumbing detroit mi" — pos 1.15, 974 impr, 0 clicks
• "commercial hvac detroit" — pos 1.38, 832 impr, 0 clicks
• "hvac contractor detroit" — pos 1.80, 703 impr, 0 clicks
• "tankless water heater installation" — pos 1.30, 697 impr, 0 clicks
• "sump pump repair" — pos 1.64, 713 impr, 0 clicks

For each query: note whether a local pack, featured snippet, or other SERP feature appears above the organic result.

If local pack confirmed → escalate to GBP optimization (category updates, photos, review response cadence).
If organic result is genuinely #1 with no feature above it → the snippet itself needs investigation.

title: Drain cleaning cost blog: price table + FAQ schema
description:
/blog/drain-cleaning-cost-metro-detroit/ ranks at position 8.75 with 850 impressions and earns 2 clicks. A content update could push this into the top 5.

Deliverables:
• Add a pricing table (Metro Detroit estimate ranges — clearly noted as ballpark figures)
• FAQPage schema: 4–5 Q&A pairs targeting "how much does drain cleaning cost", "how long does drain cleaning take", "is drain cleaning worth it", etc.
• Confirm title leads with cost/pricing signal and is ≤58 chars
• Internal link from new /sewer-drain/drain-cleaning/ page (Task 11.1) once live

title: Ferndale HVAC hub: title, meta + H1 snippet fix
description:
The /ferndale-hvac/ page ranks #1 for "heating and cooling ferndale mi" (pos 1.53) and "ferndale heating and cooling" (pos 1.55) — 5,292 combined impressions — but earns only 1 click. Pure snippet quality failure. No ranking work needed.

Issues to fix:
• Title "Ferndale HVAC Services | Cregger" = 32 chars — no trust signal, no urgency
• Meta description is boilerplate ("safe, efficient, & affordable HVAC work") copy-pasted across all Ferndale sub-pages
• H1 is ALL CAPS: "FERNDALE AC & HEATING SERVICES"

Deliverables:
• New title (≤58 chars): include "Heating & Cooling Ferndale" + "3rd Generation" or "24/7" trust signal + "| Cregger"
• New meta description (140–155 chars): Ferndale-specific, differentiated from sub-pages, include availability + free estimate hook
• H1 rewrite: sentence case with stronger hook — e.g. "Ferndale heating and cooling from a family-run team since 1985"
• Character counts required in deliverable

title: Hydro Jetting page: full content rewrite
description:
Complete a full SEO rewrite of /sewer-drain/hydro-jetting/ targeting the hydro jetting query cluster.

Deliverables:
• Word count: 1,400–1,800 words
• Primary keyword: "hydro jetting" (integrate naturally 4–6x)
• Secondary: hydro jetting sewer line, hydro jetting near me, hydro jetting services
• H1: lead with primary keyword + geo signal
• Sections: what is hydro jetting, how it works, when to use it (vs snaking), cost factors, Ferndale/Metro Detroit service area
• CTA: link to scheduling + Antler Assurance Membership
• Source: GSC data confirms 269K impressions, 31 clicks, position 24.6 — highest single opportunity on site

title: Hydro Jetting page: FAQPage schema
description:
Add FAQPage schema markup to /sewer-drain/hydro-jetting/ using the established schema architecture.

Deliverable:
• 4–6 FAQ pairs in JSON-LD <script> block (separate from existing schema, no @graph)
• Questions should target long-tail query variants: "how much does hydro jetting cost", "how long does hydro jetting take", "can hydro jetting damage pipes", etc.
• Reference root org entity at https://www.creggerplumbing.com/#organization
• Note: FAQPage added for AI/LLM citation benefit — not for Google rich results on commercial pages

title: Hydro Jetting page: title tag + meta description update

• Character counts required in deliverable
